dashboard.goalsSummary: Track your progress towards your financial goals.

accounts.deleteConfirm: Delete this account and all its data?

goals.clickMonthHint: Click a month to see details

addAccount.syncingDesc: We're pulling in your latest transactions. This usually takes a few seconds.

finary.deleteConnectionConfirm: Remove stored Finary credentials? Accounts already imported will be kept.

all.title: Sync accounts
all.trManualInfo: Trade Republic is the only bank that requires manual re-authentication. You will need to re-enter your phone number and PIN each time you sync.
all.trSlowWarning: Connection may take a few moments, this is normal.

bourso.title: BoursoBank
bourso.mfaPrompt: A code was sent via {{mfaType}} to {{contact}}

errors.serverError: BoursoBank server error. Please try again.

security.title: Security
security.description: Allowed CORS origins and cookie security
security.originsHint: URLs from which Picsou is accessible
security.secureCookiesHint: Enable only if Picsou is served over HTTPS

error.noConnectionDesc: Make sure the server is running and try again.
error.degradedMode: No connection to server. Some features may not work.
error.notFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
error.serverError: An unexpected error occurred on the server.
error.crashDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page.

intro.title: Welcome to Picsou.
intro.subtitle: Let's set you up in about 2 minutes.

admin.title: Create your admin account
admin.subtitle: This is the first — and only required — account on Picsou. You can invite others from Settings later.
admin.displayNameHint: How your name appears across the app.
admin.avatarColorInvalid: Pick one of the offered colors.

security.title: Security settings
security.subtitle: We've pre-filled everything based on how you're connecting right now. You can adjust later from Settings.
security.originsHint: URLs that are allowed to talk to Picsou's API.
security.originRequired: At least one origin is required.
security.secureCookiesHint: Keep this on when Picsou is served over HTTPS.

integrations.title: Pick your integrations
integrations.subtitle: Choose what to enable now. You can always change this later from Settings → Integrations.

enablebanking.title: Enable Banking
enablebanking.description: Connect Revolut, BoursoBank, Trade Republic and 2000+ European banks via PSD2. Takes about 5 minutes — we'll guide you.

boursobank.title: BoursoBank (sidecar)
boursobank.description: Direct sync via the bundled bourso-auth container. No external account needed.

traderepublic.title: Trade Republic
traderepublic.description: Sync your Trade Republic portfolio using your login. You'll add credentials when you create the account.

finary.title: Finary
finary.description: Import holdings and auto-sync with your Finary account. TOTP is handled at add-time.

crypto.title: Crypto exchanges
crypto.description: Track Binance and friends via read-only API keys, encrypted at rest.

hint.none: Nothing to enable now? That's fine — you can skip and configure everything later.
hint.some: {{count}} integration selected. We'll walk you through each one.
hint.some_other: {{count}} integrations selected. We'll walk you through each one.

enablebanking.appIdFormat: The Application ID doesn't look right — it should be a 32–36 character UUID.
enablebanking.keyIdFormat: The Key ID doesn't look right — it should be a 32–36 character UUID.

explain.title: What is Enable Banking?
explain.body: Enable Banking is a free, PSD2-regulated aggregator that lets Picsou talk to European banks on your behalf. It's audited and free for personal use.
explain.psd2Body: PSD2 is the EU regulation that lets licensed aggregators read your bank account with your consent. Your credentials never leave your bank.

creds.title: Paste your IDs
creds.body: In your Enable Banking dashboard, create an application named "Picsou", then copy the two values it gives you.

keypair.title: We generate your key pair
keypair.body: Picsou generates an RSA-2048 key pair on the server. The private half never leaves your machine; you upload the public half to Enable Banking.
keypair.uploadInstruction: Now in your EB dashboard → your app → Public key → paste this block.
keypair.error: We couldn't generate a key pair. Please retry.
keypair.importTitle: Import your Enable Banking private key
keypair.importBody: Enable Banking gave you a .pem file when you created your application. Upload it here — Picsou derives the public key from it for verification.
keypair.importError: Could not read the key. Make sure it's a PKCS#8 .pem file from Enable Banking.

redirect.title: Add this redirect URI
redirect.body: Add this exact URL to your Enable Banking app's "Allowed redirect URIs" list.

test.title: Test your connection
test.body: We'll make a quick authenticated call to Enable Banking to make sure everything lines up.

hints.invalid_application_id: The Application ID doesn't match what Enable Banking has on file. Double-check it on step 2.
hints.invalid_key_id: The Key ID doesn't match. It's under "Keys" in your EB app dashboard.
hints.public_key_not_uploaded: Your public key isn't uploaded yet — go back to step 3, upload it, then retry.
hints.redirect_uri_mismatch: The redirect URI isn't whitelisted on Enable Banking's side. Re-check step 4.
hints.network: We couldn't reach Enable Banking. Check your network and try again.
hints.unknown: Something went wrong. Open the server logs if you need more detail.

bourso.title: Check the sidecar
bourso.body: Picsou ships with a bourso-auth container that syncs your BoursoBank accounts. We'll ping it to make sure it's reachable.
bourso.downHint: Make sure the bourso-auth container is running. Docker Compose starts it by default.

tr.title: Trade Republic is ready to go.
tr.body: There's nothing to configure here — you'll sign in with your Trade Republic credentials when you add the account from Picsou.
tr.tip: Head to Accounts → Add account → Trade Republic once setup is done.

finary.title: Finary is ready to go.
finary.body: Nothing to configure now — you'll sign in with your Finary account when you add it from Picsou. TOTP codes are handled at add-time if your account requires them.
finary.tip: Head to Accounts → Add account → Finary once setup is done.

crypto.title: Encrypt your exchange API keys
crypto.body: Your Binance / Kraken / Coinbase API keys are encrypted at rest. Picsou can generate the encryption key for you — it stays on your disk and is never transmitted.
crypto.existed: Your encryption key already exists on disk — nothing to do.
crypto.error: We couldn't write the encryption key. Check the container logs.

complete.title: Picsou is ready.
complete.subtitle: Welcome, {{name}}.
complete.noIntegrations: You didn't enable any integrations yet — that's fine, you can do that anytime from Settings → Integrations.
